{ "name": "@esbuild/linux-x64", "version": "0.27.3", "description": "The Linux 64-bit binary for esbuild, a JavaScript bundler.", "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git+https://github.com/evanw/esbuild.git" }, "license": "MIT", "preferUnplugged": true, "engines": { "node": ">=18" }, "os": [ "linux" ], "cpu": [ "x64" ] }
